common.searchDescription: Type a subject or page name to navigate quickly.
common.searchPlaceholder: Search for a subject or page…
common.legalOpenPdfNewTab: Open PDF in a new tab
common.pricingDescription: Choose and purchase access to a specific year in the selection panel. You can activate a free trial year or proceed to Stripe payment.
common.streakFormat: {count, plural, =0 {0 days} one {1 day} other {{count} days}}
common.contentLanguageNotice: Question and explanation content is available in Polish.
common.metadataDescription: Learning that adapts to you. An adaptive platform for medical exams. Every question brings you closer to your goal.

auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter the email address you used to create your account. We will send you a link to set a new password.
auth.avatarHelper: Pick any emoji from your system keyboard — it will appear in the leaderboard and sidebar.
auth.nickHelper: Your nickname is visible in the leaderboard and can be changed later in settings.
auth.registrationCountdownMessage: Registration for new participants returns on May 17, 2026 at 9:00 PM.
auth.registerLegalNotice: By clicking "Create account", you accept the {regulaminLink} and {privacyLink}.
auth.infoAccountCreated: Account created. Check your email and confirm your address, then log in.
auth.infoResendConfirmationSent: We sent a new confirmation link to {email}. Check your inbox (and spam).
auth.infoPasswordResetSent: If an account with {email} exists, we sent a password reset link. Check your inbox (and spam).

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.nickMinLength: Nickname must be at least 3 characters.
errors.nickMaxLength: Nickname can be at most 32 characters.
errors.nickInvalidChars: Nickname can only contain letters, numbers, and . _ -
errors.avatarEmojiInvalid: Select exactly one emoji as your avatar.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.accountBlocked: This account has been blocked. Contact the administrator.
errors.registrationTemporarilyClosed: Registration is temporarily disabled until May 17, 2026, 9:00 PM.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already taken. If it's you, check your inbox (and spam) — you may already have an activation link. If it expired, click below to send a new one.
errors.passwordSecurityRequirements: Password does not meet security requirements.
errors.emailRateLimitRegister: We temporarily hit the email sending limit (this address may already have received a link). Check your inbox and spam — if the link didn't arrive, click below to try again in a moment.
errors.registerFailed: Could not create account. Try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Your email has not been confirmed yet. Check your inbox (and spam). If the link didn't arrive, resend it.
errors.emailRateLimitResend: We temporarily hit the email sending limit — try again in a few minutes.
errors.resendFailed: Could not send the link. Try again shortly.
errors.resetLinkExpired: The reset link expired. Request a new one in the "Forgot password?" section.
errors.passwordSameAsOld: New password must differ from the previous one.
errors.updatePasswordFailed: Could not update password. Try again.

sessionLoading.oneMoreAndDone: One more question and you're done? Not this time.
sessionLoading.knowMoreThanMomentAgo: You know more than a moment ago.
sessionLoading.eachQuestionCloser: Every question is one step closer.
sessionLoading.futureSelfThanks: Your future self will thank you.
sessionLoading.hardTodayObviousTomorrow: What's hard today will be obvious tomorrow.
sessionLoading.diagnosisStartsWithQuestion: Diagnosis starts with a good question.
sessionLoading.nextMinutesForYou: The next few minutes are just for you and knowledge.
sessionLoading.consistencyDoesWork: Consistency does all the work here.
sessionLoading.disciplineBehindSuccess: Discipline stands behind every success in your life.
sessionLoading.moreTodayThanYesterday: A little more today than yesterday.
sessionLoading.memoryWhenYouReturn: Memory works when you come back to it.
sessionLoading.doingForFutureSelf: You're doing this for your future self.
sessionLoading.progressNeedNotBeLoud: Progress doesn't have to be loud.

osce.listStats: {stations} stations · {tasks} tasks · pass threshold: {threshold}% per station
osce.noStations: No stations to display. Contact the administrator or try again later.
osce.competenciesHeading: Learning outcomes assessed at this station
osce.noTopics: No topics yet. Topics will be added soon.
osce.noActiveQuestions: No active questions in this topic.
osce.opgAtlasDescription: Interactive panoramas with anatomical labels. Data comes from the question bank (type {type}) for morphology structures on a pantomographic image.
osce.opgAtlasNotConfigured: OPG atlas data has not been configured yet.
osce.simulationDescription: Full timed attempt following station order. Results are saved to your profile.
osce.simulationDay1Hint: Start the first day of the exam simulation.
osce.simulationDay2Hint: Start the second day of the exam simulation.
osce.historyMigrationHint: If the table does not exist, run the SQL migration from {script} in Supabase.
osce.noSimulationHistory: No saved simulations. Complete your first attempt to see history.
osce.noStationsFiltered: No stations to display (filter or missing data in the database).
osce.sessionStationsCount: {count, plural, one {# station} other {# stations}} in this session{selectedSuffix}.
osce.examFormatStructureDescription: The exam lasts 2 days. 7 stations, 2 tasks each (14 tasks total).
osce.examFormatPassDescription: Pass threshold: at least 60% from both tasks combined at each station. No grade — only pass / fail.
osce.examFormatNoCardinalDescription: There is no cardinal error or critical point. If a tool drops — pick it up, the exam continues.
osce.examFormatResponseDescription: No oral answers — only demonstration or writing. Exception: Communication station (multiple choice).
osce.examFormatTimeDescription: A specific time per task is given on the sheet. Audio signal — it cannot be exceeded.
osce.examFormatRecordingDescription: Everything is recorded. VAR works in our favor.
osce.examFormatOrganizationDescription: We take the exam in groups of 8. 8 people go in turn, the rest wait.
osce.examFormatRetakesDescription: Only a failed station is retaken, not the whole exam. First week of September.
osce.knowledgeCardPreparingHint: Meanwhile you can practice questions — that's the best way to learn.
osce.noKnowledgeCard: No knowledge card for this topic.
osce.labelOnImage: Point on the image in order: {progress}
osce.pinchZoomHint: Pinch: zoom. Double tap: zoom / reset. Drag when zoomed in.
osce.simulationBriefing: You are about to start an OSCE simulation. Each station has 2 tasks. Pass threshold: 60% from both tasks combined. Time is limited. Good luck!
osce.noActiveStationQuestions: No active questions for this station. The station will be marked as failed.
osce.noStationsForDay: No stations for this day. Check data in the panel or contact the administrator.
osce.opgNoPanoramas: No panoramas in the atlas. Add image_identify questions in the OPG morphology topic or contact the administrator.
osce.opgAtlasHint: Choose a panorama to open the hotspot view. In the panorama you can toggle name visibility and zoom with a pinch gesture.
osce.opgPinchHint: Pinch: zoom. Double tap: zoom / reset. Click a number to see the description.
osce.opgClose: Close! Try again ({attempts, plural, one {# attempt} other {# attempts}})

pulpit.greetingNight: Night owl? Don't forget to sleep!

session.endSessionConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to end? You answered {answered} of {total} {questionsLabel}.

session.howWellKnown: How well did you know the answer?
session.catalogNoResultsHint: Try another term or clear the filter.
session.catalogModeStudyTitle: Study mode — answers and explanations visible immediately
session.catalogModeExamTitle: Exam mode — explanation after selecting an answer
session.catalogExplanationHidden: Explanation appears after you select an answer.
session.discussionEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first!
session.summaryHeadlineProgressSubtitle: {delta} points better than last time. It's sticking.
session.summaryHeadlineSolidSubtitle: You have the material under control — time for harder questions.
session.summaryHeadlineGoodSubtitle: Solid foundation — review mistakes and come back tomorrow.
session.summaryHeadlineHardSubtitle: Accuracy dropped — worth revisiting the basics of this section.
session.summaryHeadlineKeepSubtitle: Every round brings you closer to mastery. Review will help.
session.summaryInsightsFailed: Could not load insights. Try again in a moment.
session.summaryLeeches: Leeches in this session: {count} — worth reviewing separately.

saved.title: Saved questions
saved.description: Your private collection of questions for review. Open in the catalog to see explanations, or unpin when you've mastered the material.
saved.emptyDescription: During a session or in the question catalog, click the bookmark icon to save a question here.

access.chooseDescription: Dentistry year 2 works as a free trial year. Other options require a one-time payment.
access.paymentSuccess: Payment completed. Access activation in progress; refresh the page if the status doesn't update.
access.paymentCancel: Payment was cancelled. You can return to selection and try again.
access.paymentError: Could not start payment or activation process.
access.paymentPending: Waiting for Stripe webhook. Refresh activation in a few seconds.

errors.freeOnlyStoma2: Free access only for Dentistry year 2.
errors.noSession: Session expired, please log in again.
errors.stripeMissingSecret: Stripe is not configured on the server (missing STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in hosting env).
errors.stripeMissingPrice: No Stripe price configured for selected year (check STRIPE_PRICE_* in hosting env).
errors.stripeCallFailed: Stripe rejected the request. Check that key and price ID are from the same mode (test/live) and price is active.
errors.stripeNoUrl: Stripe did not return Checkout URL. Try again.
errors.supabaseProfileRead: Could not read profile from database.
errors.supabaseProfileUpdate: Could not save year selection in profile.
errors.entitlementGrantFailed: Could not save access in database.
